name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed payment deadlines cause late fees. We send reminder alerts instead of manual tracking of payment deadlines.
problem_solved: Late vendor payments due to missed deadlines.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Late vendor payments due to missed deadlines.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed payment deadlines cause late fees. We send reminder alerts instead of manual tracking of payment deadlines.
